use_case_name: Charging Loop with metering information exchange

structured.name: Charging Loop with metering information exchange
structured.objective: See ISO15118-1, use case Objective F1, page 37.
structured.description: See ISO15118-1, use case Description F1, page 37.
scenario: 1. The EV and Charging Station exchange metering information during a charging session via ISO 15118.
2. The Charging Station sends periodic TransactionEventRequest messages with meter values to the CSMS.
3. The CSMS responds with TransactionEventResponse, optionally including updated charging profiles or tariff information.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station
receives ISO 15118 signed
MeteringReceiptReq message
from EV
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHOULD NOT pass the
meter value from the MeteringReceiptReq
message to CSMS in a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType =
Updated) message. Instead, Charging Station
sends transaction-related meter values as
described in use case J02.

chunks.content:
# J03 - Charging Loop with metering information exchange

**Objective:** See ISO15118-1, use case Objective F1, page 37.

**Description:** See ISO15118-1, use case Description F1, page 37.

**Actors:** EV, CSMS, Charging Station

**Scenario:**
1. The EV and Charging Station exchange metering information during a charging session via ISO 15118.
2. The Charging Station sends periodic TransactionEventRequest messages with meter values to the CSMS.
3. The CSMS responds with TransactionEventResponse, optionally including updated charging profiles or tariff information.

metadata.heading: J03 - Charging Loop with metering information exchange
metadata.use_case_name: Charging Loop with metering information exchange

chunks.content:
# J03 - Requirements

**J03.FR.04**
Precondition: When the Charging Station
receives ISO 15118 signed
MeteringReceiptReq message
from EV
The Charging Station SHOULD NOT pass the
meter value from the MeteringReceiptReq
message to CSMS in a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType =
Updated) message. Instead, Charging Station
sends transaction-related meter values as
described in use case J02.
